questions.question: Read the statements and choose the correct option. Statement I: Marketing begins before production by identifying customer needs. Statement II: Selling mainly focuses on converting goods into cash after production. Statement III: Marketing and selling have the same scope because both end when a product is sold.
Assertion: Packaging can become part of a product's marketing mix. Reason: Packaging may protect the product, support identification, and influence buyer perception at the point of sale.
options: Both Assertion and Reason are true, and the Reason explains the Assertion.
Both Assertion and Reason are true, but the Reason does not explain the Assertion.
Assertion is true, but Reason is false.
Assertion is false, but Reason is true.
